data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding financial penalties.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the financial penalty for cancellations within 48 hours, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this specific requirement. While the linked use case mentions the penalty, there is no direct evidence demonstrating that the system enforces this rule or tracks cancellations appropriately within the specified timeframe. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of financial penalty enforcement for cancellations within 48 hours.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the financial penalty requirement.
